name: build-preset-demo-page
description: Builds the Preset Showcase page (/node/6) — a living reference of all wrapper, heading, paragraph, and card presets. Programmatically generates every preset variant to demonstrate how preset keys map to .role-* and .preset-* SCSS classes. Re-run after theme/preset changes to keep the showcase current.
preconditions: Active default theme has SDC components registered in Canvas
